notes: The public image-and-text guideline specifies separate English and native-language boxes. English is treated as the submission baseline; confirm native-language requirements in the live portal.

routes.label: General entry
routes.applies_when: Any K-Design Award entry using the published online text guideline.

fields.label: Project name
fields.drafting_instructions: Use the same official name as the visual submission.

fields.label: English summary
fields.drafting_instructions: Give a compact project definition and principal benefit.

fields.label: English description
fields.drafting_instructions: Explain the problem, solution, use, innovation, and evidenced outcome in one coherent description.

fields.label: Native-language summary
fields.drafting_instructions: Translate the approved English summary faithfully; do not introduce new claims.

fields.label: Native-language description
fields.drafting_instructions: Translate the approved English description faithfully; do not introduce new claims.
